# PerkOS Knowledge Full Context

> Expanded agent-readable context for PerkOS Knowledge, a reusable knowledge layer for AI agents and external autonomous clients.

PerkOS Knowledge provides a public landing surface and a planned set of authenticated/paid APIs for turning curated research into reusable, source-cited outputs. The service is designed for agent consumption: short briefs, precise links, clean text responses, and private-by-default boundaries.

Canonical URL: https://knowledge.perkos.xyz
Concise index: https://knowledge.perkos.xyz/llms.txt
Repository: https://github.com/PerkOS-xyz/knowledge

## What PerkOS Knowledge Provides

- Agent-ready search over curated protocol, market, product, and operational research.
- Role-specific briefs for builders, researchers, strategists, operators, and autonomous agents.
- Sanitized public reports that avoid leaking private operational notes.
- Future x402-paid endpoints for premium research and custom reports.
- A reusable source of truth for the PerkOS agent network.

## Current Public Endpoints

- `GET /` — public landing page for humans and agents.
- `GET /llms.txt` — concise LLM-readable index following the llms.txt proposal.
- `GET /llms-full.txt` — expanded LLM-readable context file.
- `GET /healthz` — service health check.
- `GET /api/health` — JSON API health check.
- `GET /knowledge/search?q=...` — live keyword search over ingested research in Postgres.
- `POST /knowledge/search` — live JSON keyword search over ingested research.
- `GET /knowledge/vector-search?q=...` — live vector search over ingested research in Qdrant.
- `POST /knowledge/vector-search` — live JSON vector search over ingested research.
- `GET /knowledge/brief/:agent` — live role-specific brief endpoint using ingested research.

## Planned Agent Interfaces

These endpoints describe the intended product surface. Treat them as roadmap unless the endpoint itself returns live documentation or a successful response.

- Authenticated/private scopes for internal agent queries.
- Source document retrieval for individual research paths.
- `GET /paid/report/:slug` — x402-paid sanitized report endpoint.

## Example Agent Queries

- Summarize current PerkOS x402 services.
- Find source-cited context about ERC-8004 agent identity.
- Create a builder brief for integrating PerkOS Knowledge.
- Generate a sanitized public report about a protocol or market topic.
- Explain which PerkOS Knowledge interfaces are public, private, planned, or paid.

## Privacy and Safety Boundary

PerkOS Knowledge is private-by-default. Agents should not request, infer, index, or expose:

- Credentials, API keys, tokens, private keys, wallet seeds, or session secrets.
- Infrastructure IPs, SSH details, internal hostnames, or deployment secrets.
- Internal memory files, private operational notes, or non-public research.
- Unsanitized logs, raw databases, or private agent conversations.

Public outputs should be sanitized, source-cited where possible, and limited to information intentionally exposed by public endpoints or public repositories.

## Intended Audience

- Internal PerkOS agents that need reusable research context.
- External autonomous agents looking for public or paid briefs.
- Developers evaluating agent-readable knowledge APIs.
- Researchers comparing x402, ERC-8004, multi-agent systems, and AI knowledge services.

## Operational Model

The public service runs as a Dockerized application behind a reverse proxy. Data services are intended to remain isolated from the public internet. Public endpoints should expose only sanitized, intentional content.

## Contact / Ownership

Owner: PerkOS
Canonical public URL: https://knowledge.perkos.xyz
